verifyGate.title: Verify your email to continue
verifyGate.description: Your 7-day grace period has ended. Verify your email to access private PandaTrack sections again.
verifyGate.helpText: You will stay signed in while you complete verification.
verifyGate.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyGate.resendError: We couldn't send the verification email. Please try again.
